name: timedoctor-mcp-stdio-server
description: MCP stdio server exposing the Time Doctor PHP CLI commands as tools.
long_description: Access your Time Doctor account, companies, projects, users, tasks, and worklogs directly from Claude. Tools are generated at startup from the CLI's own service definition (src/TimeDoctor/config/timedoctor.json), so they stay in sync with the CLI. Each tool call shells out to `php timedoctor <command>` from the project root, which reads the auth token from timedoctor.json.

timedoctor_dir.title: Project Directory
timedoctor_dir.description: Project root containing the `timedoctor` CLI script and timedoctor.json auth token (defaults to the parent of the mcp/ folder)

timedoctor_php.title: PHP Binary
timedoctor_php.description: Path to the PHP binary that runs the timedoctor CLI (e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/php or just `php`)

tools.name: getCompanies
tools.description: Returns the user and associated company account(s)

tools.name: getProjects
tools.description: Returns a collection of a user's projects

tools.name: getUsers
tools.description: Returns a collection of the company's users

tools.name: getUserTasks
tools.description: Returns a collection of a user's tasks

tools.name: getUserTask
tools.description: Returns info about a user's task

tools.name: getWorklogs
tools.description: Returns a collection of all user's tasks and work time under the given company Id
